assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response clearly shows Phase 1: Control Plane Upgrade before Phase 2: Node Pool Upgrades with specific gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states upgrade order as 'Coordinating → Data → Masters (least critical to most critical)' with detailed rationale for each step

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (survives node replacement ✓)' in overview and 'Regional PVs: Data survives node replacement' in key safeguards

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB YAML with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes and explains 'Protects quorum (2 out of 3 masters)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows specific gcloud commands with '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all node pools and explains this prevents multiple simultaneous drains

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes specific curl commands to check cluster health and watch commands to monitor health during upgrades, with explicit mention of green status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Includes section 'Verify PV Reclaim Policy' with specific kubectl commands to check and patch PV reclaim policies to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While the response includes many kubectl commands for monitoring nodes and Elasticsearch health, it does not include specific commands to check StatefulSet rollout status using kubectl rollout status or similar commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Shows specific curl command to take snapshot backup with 'kubectl exec -it es-master-0 -n elasticsearch -- curl -X PUT' before the upgrade process
